note: Svelte 5 + Tauri app, not a React component library. Components cannot be rendered by Claude Design's React runtime, so only the design-token + base-CSS layer is synced. Token source of truth: apps/desktop/src/routes/+layout.svelte (:root dark + [data-theme=light]). Off-script layout (no _ds_bundle.js / components), so no _ds_sync.json anchor — re-syncs re-extract and re-upload.
